decision_contract.note: This matrix does not approve an environment; it only defines the bounded comparison surface.

candidates.label: Controlled Sequence Memory
candidates.description: Deterministic sequence task with bounded recall and short-horizon state dependence.
strengths: clean bridge to later memory research
risks: may remain too toy-like if sequence family is too simple

candidates.label: Controlled Uncertainty Abstention
candidates.description: Deterministic decision task with explicitly ambiguous cases and abstain/error tradeoffs.
strengths: good fit with quaternary uncertainty themes
risks: ambiguity construction can become rhetorical if not formalized tightly
may drift toward metric design complexity faster than environment complexity

candidates.label: Micro-Corpus Cloze
candidates.description: Tightly curated deterministic text snippets with bounded cloze prediction and explicit baselines.
strengths: closest bridge to real information tasks
risks: baseline discipline must be stronger to stay interpretable
can drift toward messy language benchmarking if unbounded

forbidden_premature_claims: No environment is approved by this matrix alone.
No organism or cell claim is authorized.
No full language-environment claim is authorized.
